chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR _P^0.0-324 0f2023 Date Order ith signature of Judge For hoaring of maln casa. 2&292022 Mr Noor Hassan Malik Advocate for the Petitioner Mr Ali Raza Balouch AAG along with Rashid Hussain Chachar Secretary Market Committee Ubauro NrnUHHhHHh++hHnrn Original Cheque bearing N0.297426560 amounting Rs. 43256/- has been handed over to the petitioner, who is present in person Secretary, Market Committee, Ubauro is present and submits that every month pensionary amount would be deposited in the account of petitioner without fail, whereas outstanding amount shall also be paid to the petitioner within two months Petitioner and his Counsel are satisfied and this petitioner is accordingly disposed of in the above terms Compliance report shall be submitted after two months for perusal in chamber
